name: borrowed-brain-pro
description: Distills any public figure's thinking into a structured, sourced profile — then applies it as an extra lens on a real decision you're facing. Ships with 9 pre-built profiles (Buffett, Jobs, Voss, Feynman, Newport, Altman, and more). Works with Claude, ChatGPT, Open WebUI, and any AI that accepts a system prompt.
author: DOTfei

install.claude_ai: Upload SKILL.md via Settings → Capabilities → Skills
